allow: PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4317 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($p\) { $p | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } ; "killed $p" } else { "none" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($p\) { $p | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "stopped $p" } else { "none running" })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const p='src/data/fleet.js';const L=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\);L.splice\(63,77,'export const VEHICLES = FLEET_SEED.map\(veh\);'\);fs.writeFileSync\(p,L.join\('\\n'\)\);console.log\('lines now',L.length\)")

Bash(grep -n "export function AssetRegister\\|function AssetProfile\\|<h1 className=\\"h\\">{t.asset_register}\\|t.report_issue\\|{form && form !== \\"assign\\"\\|page-header\\|const { settings, dispatch } = useStore" src/screens/Assets.jsx)

Bash(node -e "const {FLEET_SEED}=await import\('./src/data/vehicles.data.js'\); for\(const v of FLEET_SEED\) console.log\(v.id, '|', v.plate, '|', v.make, v.model, '|', v.driverNote||'', '|', v.project, '| odo', v.odometer\);")

Bash(node -e "const F=await import\('./src/data/fleet.js'\); const v=F.VEHICLES.find\(x=>x.id==='V-06'\); console.log\('V-06 maint entries:', v.maintenance.length, '| everyKm', v.schedule.everyKm, '| last', v.schedule.lastServiceDate\); const c=F.vehicleCosts\(v,'2026-05'\); console.log\('May maint cost:', c.maintenance.toFixed\(2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const F=await import\('./src/data/fleet.js'\); for\(const id of ['V-06','V-02','V-07']\){const v=F.VEHICLES.find\(x=>x.id===id\); const odos=v.maintenance.map\(m=>m.odometer\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>a-b\); const svc=F.nextService\(v\); console.log\(id, v.plate, '| odos', odos.join\(','\), '| everyKm', svc.everyKm, '| due', svc.dueKm, 'kmLeft', svc.kmLeft, svc.state\);}")
